turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe parking ke baare mein puchna tha. Agar main car lekar aauon toh parking milegi?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, humare paas basement parking available hai. Kaafi spacious hai, aur pehle 2 ghante ke liye free hai. Uske baad 20 rupaye per hour charge hoga.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Two-wheeler parking bilkul free hai humari clinic ke side mein dedicated area mein.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Accha, aur clinic mein cafeteria ya canteen hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, ground floor pe ek small cafeteria hai jo subah 8 baje se raat 9 baje tak open rehti hai. Light snacks, coffee, aur meals milti hain.
